life_expectancy.dataset_description: WHO Life Expectancy dataset. Predicts life expectancy (regression). Contains country, status (Developed/Developing), and numeric health/economic indicators. Very few categorical columns — mainly 'Country' (high cardinality) and 'Status' (2 values).
must_do: encode_categorical with one_hot for nominal columns
must_not_do: Do NOT use ordinal encoding on nominal categories
life_expectancy.notes: Dataset domain: public health/economics. Categorical nature: Country is nominal high-cardinality, Status is binary. High-cardinality columns: Country (~193 unique values). ML model encoding guidance: One-hot encoding is ESSENTIAL for nominal categories. Ridge assumes linear relationships — ordinal encoding of nominal features creates false ordinal assumptions. Only use ordinal for truly ordered categories.
